domain: bee bread fermentation (worker bees inoculate pollen with honey-stomach LAB via regurgitated nectar; pH drops to 4.1 over 2 weeks; sporopollenin exine degraded by LAB enzymes; product shelf-stable for months because low pH excludes pathogens)
specific_mechanism: Microbial co-inoculation + lactic acid production + pH drop + enzymatic exine degradation + pathogen exclusion via low pH. Corpus-level steady state. Both preservation AND bioaccessibility are produced.
llm_application: Honey-LAB style auto-curated pretraining substrate (HALCS): inoculate each raw doc with a small LAB-LLM that emits an acid-score s_doc; high-s docs undergo a decode-pass that strips wrappers preserving facts. Corpus-level pH analogue = mean s; pH-gated pathogen-exclusion removes docs with corrupting facets above acidity threshold. Iterate to steady state.
novelty_claim: REWIRE (2506.04689) rewrites individual low-quality docs. Multilingual LLM-judge filtering (2505.22232) per-doc judging. None retrieve corpus-acidification + pH-gated pathogen exclusion + microbial-decode iteration to steady state.
